core_mechanism: Angular-harmonic (Fourier-mode) decomposition of a linearized kinetic transport equation in which the collision/relaxation operator damps different modes at different rates (mode-selective relaxation, with even vs. odd modes decaying unequally), solved by propagating along characteristics recast as a coupled system of integral equations
brief_reason: The abstract centers on a linearized Boltzmann equation whose distribution function is expanded in angular harmonics whose even and odd components relax at different rates, solved by extending the method of characteristics into a system of integral equations.
